raw_consumer_statement: I called in as I woke up XX/XX/XXXX in the hospital missing my credit cards. I called Amex immediately right in front of hospital security to report my cards gone to all my carriers. Amex didnt dispute all the charges and I didnt notice until this morning XX/XX/XXXX. There was a charge for XXXX XXXX or XXXX for {$360.00} that they never disputed although told that it wasnt my charge. My dispute was put in a little after XXXX and was rejected by XXXX saying the received proof. No business is open at this time to contact to do any investigation. I continuously have these issues with Amex. It feels as if dispute depts single me out/retaliating due to my previous complaints about many issues with this same dept.
